name: Montego Monty & Me Adult Cat Dry Food - 10kg
description: Product Overview Montego Monty & Me Adult Cat Food is a complete, balanced, and nutritious dry food formulated to meet the dietary needs of adult cats. It supports overall health, a shiny coat, strong muscles, and a healthy immune system keeping your feline active, playful, and full of vitality. Key Features & Benefits Nutrition: Provides 28% high-quality protein, essential amino acids, omega-6 fatty acids, and balanced fats to support energy levels, healthy skin, and a glossy coat. Vitamins & Minerals: Enriched with Vitamins E and C, plus taurine, to promote healthy eyes, strong heart function, and robust immunity. Digestive Support: Contains natural prebiotics to aid digestion and maintain balanced intestinal flora for optimal gut health. Heart Care: Optimized protein and fat ratios help support cardiac health and overall vitality. Palatability: Formulated with high-quality animal proteins, including poultry and fish meal, for enhanced taste and acceptance. Ingredients Corn, poultry meal, wheat bran, rice, corn gluten, animal fat, fish meal, brewer’s yeast, beet pulp, fish oil, acidifiers, salt, minerals, vitamins, taurine, L-Lysine, and DL-Methionine. Contains no artificial colours or soya. Includes approved antioxidants and natural flavour enhancers for improved palatability. Packaging & Storage Weight: 10 kg dry cat food bag Form: Pellet/dry kibble suitable for all adult cats Storage: Store unopened bags in a cool, dry place to maintain freshness and nutritional quality. Suitable For All adult cat breeds — providing complete, balanced nutrition for daily activity, playful behaviour, and long-term health.
